title: 🙄 GoodBoy Foundation - Supporting Dog Shelters (How Beneath Me)
subtitle: We support Slovak shelters for dogs. Dogs. The creatures that chase their own tails. Brilliant. 🙄 (I could be conquering the world, but no, here we are.)

stats.total: 💰 Total amount (not that I'm counting, but I am)
stats.contributors: 👥 Number of contributors (mortals with too much time on their hands)
stats.shelters: 🏠 Shelters (for the furry idiots who can't stop barking at mailmen)

donation.helpType: 📋 Type of help (not that it matters in the grand scheme of things 🤷)
donation.general: 💝 General donation for the foundation (how magnanimous of you)
donation.specific: 🏠 Donation for a specific shelter (oh look, you have a favourite. How precious 😏)
donation.chooseShelter: 🎯 Select shelter * (if you must. I'd choose the one with the best sunbathing spots)
donation.chooseAmount: 💰 Select amount * (don't be cheap. I've seen your Netflix subscription)
donation.customAmount: 💎 Custom amount (go on, impress me. I'm easily bored)
donation.next: ➡️ Next → (if you insist on dragging this out 🙄)
donation.donors: 👤 Donors (mortals trying to buy their way into heaven)
donation.addDonor: ➕ Add donor (the more the merrier, I suppose. More minions)
donation.editDonor: Edit (trying to improve? How adorably optimistic 🤔)
donation.atLeastOneDonor: ⚠️ Add at least one donor (you can't donate to thin air. Even I know that)
donation.consent: 📝 I agree to the processing of personal data * (as if you have a choice. I've already read your browser history 🤷‍♀️)
donation.submit: ✅ Submit donation (finally! I was beginning to age)
donation.submitting: ⏳ Submitting... (don't hold your breath. I've seen turtles move faster)
donation.newDonation: 🔄 New donation (again? Don't you have anything better to do?)
donation.success: 🎉 Thank you! (I'm not impressed, but you tried)
donation.successMessage: 📋 Your donation has been successfully recorded. (I've filed it somewhere. Probably)
donation.helpingTogether: 🤝 Together we help dogs in need 🐕 (and I plot world domination. We all have our hobbies 🐱)

donor.name: 👤 Name (your mortal name. How quaint)
donor.surname: 📛 Surname * (so I can properly judge your family line)
donor.email: 📧 Email * (I promise not to spam you... much. Maybe just a little)
donor.phone: 📱 Phone * (I won't call. I have better things to do)

name.min: 😒 Name must be at least 2 characters (even I had a longer name before my curse)
name.max: 😅 Name can be maximum 20 characters (trying to show off, are we?)

surname.min: 🙄 Surname must be at least 2 characters (if you even have one)
surname.max: 😏 Surname can be maximum 30 characters (still shorter than my list of enemies)

email.invalid: 📧 Please enter a valid email address (I know you have one. I've seen your spam folder)
email.required: 📧 Email is required (don't test me. I'm not in a good mood)

phone.invalid: 📱 Please enter a valid phone number (+420/+421 123456789) (I'm watching. I'm always watching 👀)

amount.min: 💰 Minimum amount is 1 € (even I could afford that with my catnip allowance)
amount.max: 💎 Maximum amount is 10 000 € (trying to buy your way into heaven? 😏)

errors.consent: 📝 You must agree to the processing of personal data (you've already agreed to much worse. Trust me)
errors.shelter: 🏠 Please select a shelter (decisions, decisions. How exhausting)
errors.donors: 👥 Please add at least one donor (one is fine. More is just more paperwork for me)
errors.submit: ❌ Oops! Something went wrong. Try again. Or don't. I've got centuries to wait. 😼

contact.title: 📞 Contact (if you must. I'd rather you didn't)
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with us (I'm not a cat. I'm a witch's familiar. There's a difference)
contact.info: 📋 Contact information (yes, I exist. Try to contain your excitement)
contact.address: 📍 Address (I have a lair. I mean, house. Whatever)
contact.phone: 📱 Phone (I have a phone, but I prefer telepathy)
contact.email: 📧 Email (I read them. I judge you. I delete them)
contact.hours: 🕐 Opening hours (I'm nocturnal. Deal with it)
contact.weekdays: 📅 Monday - Friday (the days I plot world domination)
contact.saturday: 🎉 Saturday (the day I take a break from plotting)
contact.sunday: 😴 Sunday (day of rest. Even I need my beauty sleep)
contact.closed: 🚫 Closed (go away. I'm busy being magnificent)
contact.emergency: 🚨 In case of emergency, contact me at +421 900 123 456. But only if it's actually an emergency. I'm not your personal assistant. I'm a terrifying creature of darkness. Well, technically I'm a cat.
contact.where: 📍 Where to find us (if you dare)
contact.whatWeDo: 🤔 Who we help (dogs. I know, but the spell book said so)
contact.shelters: 🏠 Shelters (dog shelters. Don't ask me why)
contact.sheltersDesc: We support Slovak dog shelters. Because apparently, that's what I was cursed to do.
contact.dogs: 🐕 Dogs (the creatures I am contractually obligated to help)
contact.dogsDesc: Every donation helps dogs in need. I don't make the rules. I just follow them. Mostly.
contact.cooperationDesc: Together we can change the lives of dogs in need. Or I could just turn them into cats. But that's for later)

donors.title: 👥 Contributors (a.k.a. people who passed the test)
donors.subtitle: People who help dogs. Good for them. I guess.
donors.totalAmount: 💰 Total amount (nice. Now buy me some salmon)
donors.thanks: 🎉 Thank you to all contributors! 🐕 (I'm contractually obligated to say that)
donors.thanksDesc: 🤝 Together we help. Together we pretend to care.
donors.alreadyContributed: 👥 people have already contributed (and I'm still a cat)

navigation.home: 🏠 Home (where the magic... and my bed, happens)
navigation.contact: 📞 Contact (if you want to be ignored)

footer.description: We help dog shelters. Because the universe has a sense of humour.
footer.followUs: 📱 Follow us (and I will judge you silently)
footer.followUsDesc: Stay updated on our activities. Or don't. I'm not your mother.
footer.helpingSince: 📅 Helping since 2020 (and I've been miserable about it ever since)
footer.rights: ©️ All rights reserved. (I'm very protective of my rights)
footer.madeWith: ❤️ Made with ❤️ (and a curse) for dogs. And cats. Obviously. We're superior.
